aboutIntro: We offer the best pajamas where your every morning will be gentle and your evening — relaxing. Our goal is to offer you not just sleepwear, but a true ritual of self-care.
orderInfo: After you place an order on the website, selecting the styles you prefer, our manager will contact you promptly. We will confirm all the details and provide the necessary information to complete your order, including convenient payment options.
deliveryInfo: We offer delivery via the carriers "Nova Poshta" and "Ukrposhta":
novaPoshtaInfo: Shipping is carried out with a mandatory prepayment of 200 UAH (Ukrainian Hryvnia).
ukrposhtaInfo: Delivery is available only upon full payment of the goods' value.
shippingTimesInfo: Your order will be dispatched within 1–2 business days after 7:30 PM (19:30).
exchangeTitle: Terms of Exchange and Product Inspection
exchangeInfo: We strive to ensure you receive the perfect product and guarantee its conformity to your order.
inspectionInfo: Product exchange and inspection for size conformity, as well as for the presence of manufacturing defects, are possible exclusively during the inspection of your order directly at the post office branch.
buyerResponsibilityInfo: If you pick up the parcel from the post office, it is considered confirmation that the product entirely suits you and has no defects.
failureToCollectInfo: Please note: in case of refusal to receive or failure to collect the parcel, your submitted prepayment is non-refundable. Furthermore, delivery costs (200 UAH) must be paid by the buyer. Please dedicate the necessary time for a thorough inspection at the post office.
contactInfo: We are always happy to help! Our managers are ready to offer you personal attention and assist in resolving any question regarding your order or pajama selection. You can contact us in the "Contacts" section — we look forward to your questions.
finalThankYou: Thank you for your understanding and we wish you pleasant shopping!
